strengths: 19 years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with proven ability to work in diverse technical environments and languages
Hands-on infrastructure expertise including CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK; currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Long-term entrepreneurial commitment demonstrated by founding and maintaining GISCollective platform for 9+ years with active open-source community and production users
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field; recent AI infrastructure work lacks indicators of deep expertise such as publications, ML model development, or platform-level ML architecture

Resume demonstrates senior execution-level roles (Staff Engineer, Senior Developer) but no clear principal or director-level strategic impact, architectural leadership at scale, or evidence of advising strategic customers on cutting-edge technologies
Portfolio emphasizes technical implementation over AI-powered product differentiation; no demonstrated products or platforms built with AI as a core strategic enabler

key_factors.factor: Deep AI/ML Expertise vs. Recent Infrastructure Exposure
Strong Technical Foundation, Cloud Infrastructure & Entrepreneurial Track Record

response.justification: Bogdan meets minimum requirements (15+ years experience, BS in Computer Science) and demonstrates strong technical breadth across infrastructure, cloud (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes), and entrepreneurial commitment (GISCollective). However, the role explicitly requires principal/director-level strategic leadership, and the resume shows only senior IC achievement. While current work at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure, there is no evidence of recognized deep AI/ML expertise, demonstrated AI-powered products, or strategic customer advisory experience—all preferred qualifications for this AI strategy-focused role. The profile represents a capable senior engineer, not yet a principal-level strategic technical leader in AI.
